explanation: This command uses standard syntax with escaped quotes to simulate a typical Seatbelt execution that matches the Sigma rule. It includes a group flag and an output file parameter, both of which are covered in the detection conditions.
This is a simplified version of the command without escaped quotes, but still includes the group and outputfile parameters. It matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses a direct command parameter instead of a group flag. It matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria based on the CommandLine|contains condition.
This command uses a group flag and an outputfile parameter with quotes embedded in the filename. It still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command combines a group flag and a direct command parameter, using escaped quotes for the group flag. It matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
